title: Bloody Bones (insignia)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Cadesbloodybones.jpg|thumb|Cade Skywalker's version of the Bloody Bones.]]
{{Quote|By the ''Bloody Bones'', I swear I will be true and loyal to you or forfeit will be my life.|[[Rav]] reciting the [[Bloody Bones oath]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 23">[[Legacy (2006) 23|''Legacy'' (2006) 23]]</ref>}}
The '''Bloody Bones''' were the insignia of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rav]], composed of two crossed red bones, and feared throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Cade Skywalker]] added a skull to his [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]], thus making the symbol his own.
